ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "level" TEXT /* Skill level of the course (L1-L5) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "total_candidates" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates the course can accommodate */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for enrolling in the course */,
  "target_candidates" TEXT /* Target candidates for the course (e.g., unskilled, semi-skilled) */,
  "industry_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the course to industry needs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the candidate (L1-L5) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the candidate (e.g., high school, bachelor's degree) */,
  "work_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of work experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the candidate is enrolled in */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "drop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping the course (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment being assessed */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in the assessment */,
  "date_of_assessment" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the assessment (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the certificate */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course completed */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Unique certificate number */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the certificate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the certificate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "expertise_level" TEXT /* Expertise level of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which feedback is provided */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the candidate (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the training center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the training center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the training center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training center was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training center was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being scheduled */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training center where the course is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "time_slots" TEXT /* Time slots for the training sessions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES training_centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry partner */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the industry partner organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the industry partner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the industry partner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry partner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry partner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry partner involved in the partnership */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the partnership */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., sponsorship, curriculum development) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partnership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partnership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES industry_partners ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_centers" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "center_id")
)
